name: JJK Dystopian
description:
Caged with a convicted criminal and his baby sandworm isn't quite how you planned your supply run to end...

Everyone on the cover art is here: Choso Kamo, Toge Inumaki, Yuta Okkotsu, Megumi Fushiguro, Toji Fushiguro, Nanami Kento, Yuji Itadori, Ryomen Sukuna, Satoru Gojo, Suguru Geto... then I took a deep breath and decided to add Mahito.

Me and my goddamn niche content smh, hyperfocus is such a bitch. But I had so much fun making this it should be concerning. The intro is ginormous, my brand, but I promise it's a gem.

CW: Dystopian AU so humanity sucking, the planet dying, resource shortage and etc.

Choso is so tired, Inumaki gets a hilarious nickname from Mahito, Yuta hunts down sandworms, Megumi ignores the shit out of Toji, Toji's worm likes you, Nanami's seriously injured, Yuji's bullied by his own body as usual, Sukuna lives rent free with them (literally, cause the one contributing to the group is Yuji not him), Satoru is the sassiest man alive, and Suguru the driest. Mahito is a fucking menace and lowkey the soul of this idea.

Do cursed spirits sleep? Here they do, and while standing. Also technology has come a long way.

Everyone is an adult as usual.

Nobara, Yuki and Shoko are mentioned but not full-on around cause token count has given me problems before.

None of these masterpieces on the cover are my own, Sukuna's steals the show for me, and Gojo's makes me smile.

If token count fucks your chat, let me know!

☆Hope you enjoy☆
creator: PrincessDulcinea
